title: Gamma-diversity partitioning of gobiid fishes (Teleostei: Gobiidae) ensemble along of Eastern Tropical Pacific: biological inventory, latitudinal variation and species turnover
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"brfhm","text":"Evaluation of β-diversity partitioning in its spatial turnover (BJTU) and nestedness (BJNE) components along a latitudinal gradient across biogeographic provinces.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":163},{"style":"sub","offset":65,"length":3},{"style":"sub","offset":87,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"86qpa","text":"We obtained β-diversity partitioning in its spatial turnover (BJTU) and nestedness (BJNE) components along a latitudinal gradient across biogeographic provinces using Betapart package in R project, following to https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/betapart/betapart.pdf","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":63,"length":3},{"style":"sub","offset":85,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
